title: Import Specific item from Jira to board
excerpt:

posts.author: Daniel.il (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

i want to build board using Jira Integration:

in this integration i can choose if it will be any Jira/Task/Story etc…

but i dont want that all (100%) of the story / task that created in my Jira will create item in Monday,
how to do it?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: @Daniel.il, Can you give more details on what you are looking for?
